/cwe/weakness/1052.Name: Excessive Use of Hard-Coded Literals in Initialization
/cwe/weakness/1052.Description:
The product initializes a data element using a hard-coded
					literal that is not a simple integer or static constant element.
/cwe/weakness/1052.ExtendedDescription: This issue makes it more difficult to modify or maintain the product, which indirectly affects security by making it more difficult or time-consuming to find and/or fix vulnerabilities. It also might make it easier to introduce vulnerabilities.
